automatic-backup-info: The system will perform automatic backups according to the established configuration. You can modify the frequency, day and time from the control panel.
backup-charset-error: The backup encoding is %db-charset%, while in config.php it is %config-charset%. Press the change encoding button before restoring.
backup-charset-mixed-warning: Warning: The backup contains tables with multiple encodings (%charsets%). Your current configuration is %config-charset%.
backup-file-too-big: The backup file is too large to upload to the server. The maximum size is %size% MB
backup-memory-warning: Warning: the backup takes %size% MB, but you only have %memory% MB of memory available. Insufficient to perform the backup.
backup-port-warning: The MySQL port should be 3306, but you are using %port%
backup-use-fixer-plugin: It is recommended to use the Fixer plugin to correct table encodings before making backups.
config-mysql-charset-error: Encoding constants are missing in the config.php file ('%config-charset%', '%config-collate%')
download-backup-p: Download a backup copy of your database and another of your files. Keep these files in a safe place. If at any time you want to restore FacturaScripts data, you will need these files.
last-backup-more-30d: The last backup is more than 30 days old. Make a new one from the Administrator menu, Backups.
mysql-support-only: This plugin only works on MySQL
new-admin-password-p: Optional. Set a new password for the admin user after restoration. Leave empty to keep the backup's password.
restore-admin-access-p: Optional. You can change the existing admin password or create a new admin user to ensure access after restoration.
restore-admin-disable-2fa: Disable two-factor authentication for the admin user
restore-admin-nick-required: The username (nick) of the new admin is required.
restore-admin-password-weak: The password is too weak. It must be at least 8 characters long, including letters and numbers.
restore-backup-p: If you have the files with your database and your files, you can restore the FacturaScripts data. Select the two files and press the restore button.
restore-backup-warning: Warning: restoring FacturaScripts data is like going back in time. Everything that was not in the backup will be deleted, that is, the invoices that you have made later and are not in the copy, will be lost.
restore-files-p: If you have the backup of the files, select that zip file and press the restore button.
restore-no-admin-found: No admin user found in the restored database.
switch-db-charset-p: The database encoding must be the same as the backup. If you need to change it, press the save button.
